name: Snails Cauderan / Escargots a La Cauderan
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard in a sauté pan and brown the ham and chopped shallots. Add a small amount of breadcrumbs soaked in wine.
2. Moisten with stock and season with salt and pepper. Add bouquet garni. Cook for 20 minutes.
3. Add the starved and well-washed snails. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently, for an additional 40 minutes.
Preparation time: 1 hour
Cooking time: 1 hour
